steps.title: Use the second point
steps.content:
Substitute $(-2,\frac{226}{25})$ into the function:
$$a^{-2}+9=\frac{226}{25}$$
$$a^{-2}=\frac{1}{25}$$
Thus $a^2=25$, and since $a$ is positive, $a=5$.

steps.title: Compute the product
steps.content:
Multiply the two constants and evaluate the product:
$$ab=5\cdot9=45$$
The answer is C.
